queries.question: How do I reset my password?
queries.answer_text: To reset your password, navigate to the login page and click "Forgot Password". Enter your registered email address and you will receive a reset link within 5 minutes.
queries.citations: [{"id": "doc-password-reset", "title": "Password Reset Guide", "source": "IT Knowledge Base"}, {"id": "doc-account-mgmt", "title": "Account Management", "source": "IT Knowledge Base"}]

queries.question: What is the vacation policy for contractors?
Why are login requests failing for region us-east?
queries.answer_text: Login failures in us-east are caused by an expired TLS certificate on the auth-proxy-east-1 load balancer. The certificate expired on 2026-03-09. The on-call team has been paged and a hotfix is in progress.
